page: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 4 dedicated vCPUs derived from 2 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. Additionally, the instance comes bundled with 154 GB of local SSD storage and supports Premium Storage disks for expanded I/O requirements.

Benchmark evaluations reveal a distinct contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The AMD EPYC 7763 processor delivers strong single-core performance, as evidenced by its stress-ng single-core score of 2700.19, placing it in the top 25% of tested servers. However, multi-core and memory-intensive operations show limitations. Multi-core performance in stress-ng and Geekbench falls into the bottom 25%, while multi-threaded bzip3 decompression is positioned in the bottom 10%. Memory bandwidth tests also reflect lower-tier performance, with large-block read and write speeds reaching 38.0 GB/sec and 22.11 GB/sec respectively.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the D4ads_v5 offers a balanced resource profile for workloads that do not require sustained multi-core execution or high memory bandwidth. The inclusion of 154 GB of local storage provides a cost-effective option for temporary data caching without needing external disk attachments. Given its strong single-threaded performance but weaker multi-core and database benchmark results, this instance is best suited for light web serving, single-threaded batch processing, basic text processing, and general-purpose development or testing environments.
description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v5 is a general-purpose virtual machine powered by an AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM. Running on the x86_64 architecture under Microsoft Hyper-V, this instance includes 154 GB of local SSD storage and is Premium Storage capable. Performance benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU capabilities, though multi-core execution and memory bandwidth fall into the lower tiers. With a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the D4ads_v5 provides a cost-effective hardware profile for workloads that prioritize single-threaded efficiency over massive parallelization. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, light web serving, text processing, and development environments.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v5 is an AMD EPYC 7763-powered general-purpose instance featuring 4 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, offering strong single-core performance for balanced workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure D4ads_v5 is a general-purpose VM with 4 AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 154 GB local storage, optimized for single-core tasks.
tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, integrated local storage, and strong single-core performance.
bullet_points: Powered by AMD EPYC 7763 processor with 4 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB RAM
Includes 154 GB of local SSD storage with Premium Storage capability
Delivers strong single-core CPU performance in benchmark testing
Features hardware-accelerated cryptography via AES and SHA extensions
Suited for general-purpose workloads, light web serving, and text processing
